## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — maintenance, refactoring, dependencies
- [ ] test — tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] Typescript type-check passes (`npm run typecheck` in `frontend/`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, SKILL.md, AGENTS.md as needed)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] All AI contributions reviewed by a human engineer
